case_title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES vs. TAYBRON, VALERIE et al

docket_entries.description: 9:45AM C/C FOR SETT. CONF, MICHAEL ROSSOFF APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF DEFENDANT VALERIE TAYBRON PRESENT, BUT ATTORNEY DALLAS BROCK NOT PRESENT. MR. ROSSOFF LEAVES AND AT 10AM MR. BROCK APPEARS AND MEETS WITH JUDGE IN CHAMBERS. MR. BROCK INFORMS THE JUDGE THAT DEFT. WILL WAIVE A JURY ON TRIAL DATE. CASE MAY SETTLE BUT REMAINS ON TRIAL CALENDAR UNLESS THE COURT IS NOTIFIED BY THE PARTIES THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED. MR. BROCK STILL HAS NOT FILED A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, AND MUST DO SO IF HE IS TO REPRESENT MS. TAYBRON IF CASE GOES TO TRIAL.
